headline: Reassessing PulteGroup (PHM) After Sharp One Month Pullback In The Share Price
summary: If you are wondering whether PulteGroup’s recent share price really matches its underlying value, you are not alone. This article is aimed squarely at that question. The stock most recently closed at US$119.19, with a 7 day return of a 6.8% decline and a 30 day return of a 14.4% decline, while the return over 1 year sits at 16.7%, over 3 years at 119.6%, and over 5 years at 154.7%. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing investor attention on large US homebuilders, as markets continue...
